purpose_context: Today doctrine org init only writes a minimal three-file skeleton. Operators who already maintain a reusable doctrine template need Spec Kitty to copy that template (from a local path or git URL with branch), exclude ignored paths, validate the org name, substitute identity and registration-path tokens, and write the result to a distinct pack destination—while keeping the minimal scaffold when no template is supplied.
purpose_tldr: Let operators scaffold an org doctrine pack from a local or git template with validated ORG_NAME, LOCAL_PATH substitution, and .templateignore filtering.
source_description: Extend doctrine org init to render from a local or git TEMPLATE with ORG_NAME validation, LOCAL_PATH substitution, .templateignore filtering, and PACK_PATH as a distinct destination; minimal scaffold when TEMPLATE omitted.
